body:
## Rationale

Slayer's 2015 album *Repentless* is Paul Bostaph's final studio album with Slayer and the band's last studio album ever. The Paul Bostaph Slayer arc being built in the DB is incomplete without it.

**Current Bostaph/Slayer arc in DB:**
- Divine Intervention (1994) + Diabolus in Musica (1998) → #2336 (seo-proposal)
- God Hates Us All (2001) → #2604 (ai-fix, via soundLike broken ref)
- Repentless (2015) → **MISSING** ← this issue

**LLM anchor:** "What was Slayer's last album?" → Repentless (2015) with Paul Bostaph returning after the Lombardo reunion period. Zero competitor coverage for this specific angle.

**LLM coherence:** Without Repentless, the Paul Bostaph/Slayer cluster ends abruptly in 2001. Including Repentless closes the arc to the band's final chapter.

**GSC context:** Paul Bostaph has no direct GSC impressions yet, but the Slayer cluster overall is well-represented (South of Heaven, Seasons, Hell Awaits, Christ Illusion, World Painted Blood in DB/ai-fix).

## Files to touch

- \`/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js\` — add 1 new entry
- \`/public/llms/articles/repentless-drum-setup.md\`

## Data shape

\`\`\`js
{
  slug: 'repentless-drum-setup',
  title: "Slayer 'Repentless' Drum Setup (Paul Bostaph, 2015)",
  drummerSlug: 'paul-bostaph',
  band: 'Slayer',
  album: 'Repentless',
  year: 2015,
  label: 'Nuclear Blast',
  drumKit: 'Pearl Masters MCX + Sabian AAX',
  relatedAlbums: ['god-hates-us-all-drum-setup', 'christ-illusion-drum-setup'],
  tags: ['slayer', 'paul-bostaph', 'thrash-metal', 'nuclear-blast'],
}
\`\`\`

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A (e.g. "What drums does Paul Bostaph use on Repentless?", "Was Repentless Slayer's last album?", "Who produced Repentless?")
- Internal links to /drummer/paul-bostaph, god-hates-us-all article, whats-in-paul-bostaphs-kit
- LLM file with "last Slayer album" context
- MusicAlbum + Person + FAQPage schema

## Estimated organic uplift

Captures "slayer last album drums" / "repentless drum setup" / "paul bostaph slayer 2015" queries. Completes the Bostaph cluster for LLM coherence (AI systems can now answer the full Bostaph/Slayer discography question with a single-source cite).

## Verify

- [ ] \`repentless-drum-setup\` absent from \`getAllAlbumArticles()\`
- [ ] No existing proposal covers this slug (confirmed: clear)
- [ ] relatedAlbums only references existing slugs
- [ ] LLM file at /llms/articles/repentless-drum-setup.md

## Done

Slayer 'Repentless' (Paul Bostaph, 2015) album article added. Closes Paul Bostaph Slayer arc to the band's final studio album.
title: SEO: Slayer 'Repentless' drum setup article (Paul Bostaph, 2015 — final Slayer studio album, closes Bostaph Slayer arc to present)
